arts.ttl: Serie A Liveblog inc Roma-Inter, Empoli-Napoli, Venezia-Atalanta
Venezia coach Di Francesco praises Joronen, contemplates goalkeeper choice for Atalanta clash
arts.sum: Venezia head coach Eusebio Di Francesco addressed the media in a pre-match conference ahead of their upcoming Serie A fixture against Atalanta. The manager spoke highly of goalkeeper Jesse Joronen while hinting at a potential selection dilemma between Joronen and Filip Stankovic. Di Francesco commended Joronen’s professionalism, stating, “He’s a great professional who always trains at his maximum.” Regarding the goalkeeper selection for the match, he added, “I have to decide on the day. I’m making evaluations; either he or Stankovic will play.” When questioned about carrying four goalkeepers in the squad, Di Francesco explained, “I always bring as many The post Venezia coach Di Francesco praises Joronen, contemplates goalkeeper choice for Atalanta clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Venezia take on Atalanta to leave the bottom
arts.sum: Atalanta have won their last two Serie A away games against Venezia and could they win three such matches in a row against the Veneti for the first time in the competition. Venezia won their last Serie A home match (2-0 against Genoa) and could win back-to-back at home for the first time in the competition since January 2000, under Luciano Spalletti.

arts.ttl: Unique Nocta Venezia 24-25 Pre-Match Shirt Released
arts.sum: Two days ago, Nocta launched the limited edition Venezia 24-25 pre-match shirt with a vibrant and unique design.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Venezia v Atalanta: Match Preview
arts.sum: Venezia welcome high-flying Atalanta to the Stadio Pier Luigi Penzo on Sunday as Serie A action resumes following the international break. The hosts find themselves rooted to the bottom of the table, while Atalanta aim to continue their push for European places. Venezia’s return to Italy’s top flight has been a struggle so far. With just one win and four points from their opening seven matches, the Lagunari occupy 20th place and face an uphill battle to avoid immediate relegation back to Serie B.
